reviews.review_msg: I've taken two classes with Professor Thomas, and both have been equally enjoyable. The course screenings and readings are not only interesting but also very relevant to what's happening in the world today, which made the material feel meaningful and easy to connect with. Overall, this has been one of the best university classes I've taken.
She is one of the toughest graders among CMNS professors.

Dr Thomas is an awesome prof! I really do recommend this course. Ta was extremely harsh with marking but both ta and dr thomas was easy to confront for feedback. Take home essays were easy and you have a whole week to do them.

Without a doubt, Dr. Thomas is the BEST prof I've taken at SFU. Her class was the best ever, the lectures were engaging and you could clearly tell she was passionate about what she taught. The midterm and final were take-home short essays, and the photo essay was a blast! Cannot recommend her enough!

Erique is by far my favourite prof at SFU. I've taken a couple courses with them and never been disappointed. They are so kind and make the topics actually interesting and applicable to modern day media and culture. Overall an amazing professor.
